title: lathyrus bolanderi var. barbarae
intro: Lathyrus bolanderi var. barbarae, also known as the Bolander's pea or California sweet pea, is a perennial plant species in the family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Lathyrus bolanderi var. barbarae include reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
